description: Verso: note possibly in the hand of Ḥananʾel b. Shemuʾel. Order of payment, instructing al-Raṣuy to give 5 nuqra dirhams and 15 wariq dirhams to Eliyyahu the Judge which he had loaned for [...], and 12 dirhams for the lighting, and 3 dirhams for "jarīd" (=lulavs?). Written on the eve of Sukkot.
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
